_comment: Sequentia asset registry server. Mirrors an upstream registry (last good copy kept when it is down) and overlays the operator's local entries: add/edit/verify/remove from the admin UI at /admin. The merged index is served at /registry/index.minimal.json in the standard format, a drop-in registry URL for nodes (assetregistryurl), price servers and wallets.

ui._comment: public_page/public_index expose the human table and the JSON index (both ON by default: a registry exists to be read), rate-limited per IP. password_hash gates the admin area; set it with --set-password, never by hand.
